message:
Add web adapter e2e smoke test with graceful Chrome skip

Runs the full agent loop against a real web page using a scripted mock
LLM client. Skips gracefully when Chrome is unavailable (e.g., Bun's
http module doesn't support WebSocket upgrade events needed by
chrome-ws-lib).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
